nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Rufous-tailed flycatcher
nodes.summary: Rufous-tailed flycatcher（Rufous-tailed flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus validus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于次生林，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits most of the available landscapes including several forest and woodland types, secondary forest, and dry scrublands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits most of the available landscapes including several forest and woodland types, secondary forest, and dry scrublands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Due to lack of funds the parks offer only nominal protection from habitat destruction and hunting

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Due to lack of funds the parks offer only nominal protection from habitat destruction and hunting
